forbidden_claims: reaction occurrence
chemical mechanism
energetic favorability
rules.name: closed-boundary retained-ledger conservation
rules.statement: If the declared closed boundary preserves ledger L(n)=A n, then A(n1-n0)=0.

assumptions: linear ledger map over the declared quantity domain
forbidden_claims: every kernel direction is physically realized
rules.name: kernel characterization
rules.statement: A change delta preserves the ledger iff delta is in ker(A).

forbidden_claims: basis vectors are actual reactions without compatibility evidence
rules.name: extent coordinates from a declared kernel basis
rules.statement: If columns of N form a basis for the admitted kernel subspace, every admitted change has coordinates xi with delta=N xi.

forbidden_claims: the boundary is reached dynamically
rules.name: positivity and capacity region
rules.statement: Admitted coordinates satisfy n0+N xi >= 0 and all declared capacity/boundary inequalities.

forbidden_claims: the resulting quotient is chemistry without semantic calibration
rules.name: finite quotient counterexample refinement
rules.statement: For a finite state set, repeatedly splitting cells by declared readout and successor-cell signatures terminates in an exact closed refinement.

forbidden_claims: retention alone forces readout additivity
rules.name: conditional additive-readout representation
rules.statement: If composition is a free commutative monoid and R is a monoid homomorphism, then R(c)=sum_i c_i R(e_i).

forbidden_claims: fixed quotient state implies thermodynamic equilibrium
rules.name: observational stationarity is weaker than source equilibrium
rules.statement: A quotient fixed point can hide source-state cycles or currents; therefore fixed quotient readout alone establishes only observational stationarity.

forbidden_claims: grammar families are root theorems
rules.name: discovery grammar declaration
rules.statement: Candidate mathematical languages must be frozen and reported before held-out evidence is opened.

forbidden_claims: proof of arbitrary real-valued numerical stability
rules.name: exact rational finite witness checker
rules.statement: Use integer/Fraction arithmetic for the finite proof witnesses in v0.901.

forbidden_claims: the registry is a periodic table
the chosen generators are ontologically fundamental
rules.name: frozen typed generator registry
rules.statement: Freeze generator identities, aliases, source profiles, contexts, and permitted transformations before quotient admission.

forbidden_claims: source interactions are commutative
a chemical formula has been established
rules.name: free structural composition carrier
rules.statement: For a frozen finite generator registry G, N^G with coordinatewise addition and zero is a free commutative monoid.

assumptions: every source token resolves to exactly one registered generator
unknown or aliased tokens obstruct the map
forbidden_claims: token order is physically irrelevant
rules.name: source-word occupation homomorphism
rules.statement: Counting registered generators maps empty source word to zero and concatenation to coordinatewise addition.

assumptions: complete frozen profile list for the claim
exact signature comparison at declared resolution
forbidden_claims: unregistered observables are permutation invariant
commutativity is universal
rules.name: finite permutation sufficiency theorem
rules.statement: If equal occupation vectors imply equal registered readout and successor signatures in every frozen profile, the count quotient exactly factors those profiles.

assumptions: no unresolved alias or generator relation
forbidden_claims: source-state factorization is unique without an encoding certificate
uniqueness survives registry changes without a refinement map
rules.name: conditional decomposition uniqueness
rules.statement: Within N^G and a frozen independent generator basis, occupation coordinates uniquely specify structural decomposition.

assumptions: each refined generator has a declared parent contribution
forbidden_claims: the refinement is empirically correct without profile validation
rules.name: refinement/coarsening composition theorem
rules.statement: A declared nonnegative-integer coarsening map P commutes with composition: P(c+d)=Pc+Pd.

assumptions: lineage identifiers are immutable and collision-checked within the release scope
forbidden_claims: occupation vectors alone preserve history
rules.name: structural sharing without lineage erasure
rules.statement: The marked quotient stores structural occupation separately from an append-only lineage sidecar; equal structural projections need not identify marked histories.

forbidden_claims: proof for unenumerated states or profiles
rules.name: finite exact profile gate implementation
rules.statement: Enumerate all registered same-count pairs and compare exact frozen signatures.
